FFlagReportWindowsTabletMetrics.mechanism: Collects performance data specifically from Windows tablet devices.
FFlagReportWindowsTabletMetrics.purpose: Helps improve the game experience for Windows tablet users by analyzing how the platform performs.

DFFlagVideoWinHwEncoderSortMFTs_Staged.mechanism: Organizes hardware video encoders for better performance on Windows.
DFFlagVideoWinHwEncoderSortMFTs_Staged.purpose: Optimizes video streaming quality for players using Windows devices.

DFFlagLargeReplicatorSendMaxThrow.mechanism: Increases the maximum data that can be sent through the replicator system.
DFFlagLargeReplicatorSendMaxThrow.purpose: Enhances game performance by allowing larger amounts of data to be processed efficiently.

DFIntConvexDecompCompressionSelector.mechanism: Selects the method for compressing convex decomposition data in 3D models.
DFIntConvexDecompCompressionSelector.purpose: Improves performance and reduces loading times for complex shapes in games.
